content.json:
# ☸ Arc K8s Metrics Dashboard

Monitor Kubernetes performance metrics for Azure Arc-enabled clusters — CPU, memory, disk, network, pods, and nodes.

parameters.name: Clusters
parameters.label: Cluster(s)
parameters.query:
resources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetes/connectedclusters'
| project value = name, label = name, selected = true
| order by label asc

parameters.name: Workspace
parameters.label: Log Analytics Workspace
parameters.query:
kubernetesconfigurationresources
| where type == 'microsoft.kubernetesconfiguration/extensions'
| where tostring(properties.ExtensionType) =~ 'microsoft.azuremonitor.containers'
| extend workspaceId = tostring(properties.ConfigurationSettings.logAnalyticsWorkspaceResourceID)
| where isnotempty(workspaceId)
| distinct workspaceId
| project id = workspaceId

content.json:
## Cluster-level Metrics
Aggregated resource usage across all nodes per cluster.

content.query:
let clusterNodes = KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| distinct Computer, ClusterName;
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SNode' and CounterName == 'cpuUsageNanoCores'
| lookup kind=inner clusterNodes on Computer
| summarize ['CPU (millicores)'] = avg(CounterValue) / 1000000 by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), ClusterName
| render timechart
content.title: Cluster CPU Usage (millicores)

content.query:
let clusterNodes = KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| distinct Computer, ClusterName;
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SNode' and CounterName == 'memoryWorkingSetBytes'
| lookup kind=inner clusterNodes on Computer
| summarize ['Memory (GB)'] = avg(CounterValue) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), ClusterName
| render timechart
content.title: Cluster Memory Working Set (GB)

content.query:
KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| summarize ['Node Count'] = dcount(Computer) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), ClusterName
| render timechart
content.title: Node Count

content.query:
KubePodInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| summarize ['Pod Count'] = dcount(PodUid) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), ClusterName
| render timechart
content.title: Pod Count

content.query:
let clusterNodes = KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| distinct Computer, ClusterName;
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SNode' and CounterName == 'memoryRssBytes'
| lookup kind=inner clusterNodes on Computer
| summarize ['Memory RSS (GB)'] = avg(CounterValue) / (1024 * 1024 * 1024) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), ClusterName
| render timechart
content.title: Cluster Memory RSS (GB)

content.json:
## Node-level Metrics
Per-node resource usage — CPU, memory, allocatable capacity, and status.

content.query:
let clusterNodes = KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| distinct Computer;
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SNode' and CounterName == 'cpuUsageNanoCores'
| where Computer in (clusterNodes)
| summarize ['CPU (millicores)'] = avg(CounterValue) / 1000000 by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Computer
| render timechart
content.title: Node CPU Usage (millicores)

content.query:
let clusterNodes = KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| distinct Computer;
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SNode' and CounterName == 'memoryWorkingSetBytes'
| where Computer in (clusterNodes)
| summarize ['Memory (MB)'] = avg(CounterValue) / (1024 * 1024) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Computer
| render timechart
content.title: Node Memory Working Set (MB)

content.query:
let clusterNodes = KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| distinct Computer;
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SNode' and CounterName == 'memoryRssBytes'
| where Computer in (clusterNodes)
| summarize ['Memory RSS (MB)'] = avg(CounterValue) / (1024 * 1024) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Computer
| render timechart
content.title: Node Memory RSS (MB)

content.query:
let clusterNodes = KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| distinct Computer;
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SNode' and CounterName == 'cpuAllocatableNanoCores'
| where Computer in (clusterNodes)
| summarize ['CPU Allocatable (millicores)'] = avg(CounterValue) / 1000000 by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Computer
| render timechart
content.title: Node CPU Allocatable (millicores)

content.query:
let clusterNodes = KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| distinct Computer;
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SNode' and CounterName == 'memoryAllocatableBytes'
| where Computer in (clusterNodes)
| summarize ['Memory Allocatable (MB)'] = avg(CounterValue) / (1024 * 1024) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Computer
| render timechart
content.title: Node Memory Allocatable (MB)

content.query:
KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| summarize Ready = countif(Status == 'Ready'), NotReady = countif(Status != 'Ready') by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), ClusterName
| render timechart
content.title: Node Ready vs Not Ready

content.json:
## Pod-level Metrics
Per-pod resource consumption, container restarts, phase distribution, and events.

content.query:
let clusterNodes = KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| distinct Computer;
let topContainers = Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SContainer' and CounterName == 'cpuUsageNanoCores'
| where Computer in (clusterNodes)
| summarize AvgCpu = avg(CounterValue) by InstanceName
| top 15 by AvgCpu desc
| project InstanceName;
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SContainer' and CounterName == 'cpuUsageNanoCores'
| where Computer in (clusterNodes)
| where InstanceName in (topContainers)
| summarize ['CPU (millicores)'] = avg(CounterValue) / 1000000 by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), InstanceName
| render timechart
content.title: Top 15 Containers — CPU (millicores)

content.query:
let clusterNodes = KubeNodeInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| distinct Computer;
let topContainers = Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SContainer' and CounterName == 'memoryWorkingSetBytes'
| where Computer in (clusterNodes)
| summarize AvgMem = avg(CounterValue) by InstanceName
| top 15 by AvgMem desc
| project InstanceName;
Perf
| where ObjectName == 'K8SContainer' and CounterName == 'memoryWorkingSetBytes'
| where Computer in (clusterNodes)
| where InstanceName in (topContainers)
| summarize ['Memory (MB)'] = avg(CounterValue) / (1024 * 1024) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), InstanceName
| render timechart
content.title: Top 15 Containers — Memory (MB)

content.query:
KubePodInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| where ContainerRestartCount > 0
| summarize ['Containers Restarting'] = dcount(ContainerID) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), ClusterName
| render timechart
content.title: Containers with Restarts

content.query:
KubeEvents
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| where Reason in ('BackOff', 'Unhealthy', 'Failed', 'FailedScheduling', 'OOMKilling', 'Evicted', 'FailedMount', 'FailedAttachVolume')
| summarize ['Events'] = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Reason
| render timechart
content.title: Warning Events by Reason

content.query:
KubePodInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| summarize PodCount = dcount(PodUid) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), PodStatus
| render timechart
content.title: Pod Count by Phase

content.query:
KubePodInventory
| where '*' in~ ({Clusters}) or ClusterName in~ ({Clusters})
| summarize PodCount = dcount(PodUid) by bin(TimeGenerated, {TimeRange:grain}), Namespace
| render timechart
content.title: Pod Count by Namespace
